DP.130.0000:
Hmmm... BURMY are an
interesting example...\f
They hint at how the environment can
shape people’s personality.
DP.130.0001:
You know about BURMY and how
they come in different forms?\f
Do you have all forms of that there
BURMY?\f
DP.130.0002:
Aww, you don’t even have a single
BURMY?\f
You don’t like ’em?
They’re kind of mooshy and cute!
DP.130.0003:
Hmm...\f
It’d be cool if you had all the
different-looking BURMY.
DP.130.0004:
Cool! That’s all the different kinds
of BURMY! I feel giddy!\f
Since I feel so giddy, take this!
Go ahead, take it!\f
DP.130.0005:
Whoops, your Bag is crammed full!
I’ll give this to you later.
DP.130.0006:
You’re good!
You’d make an awesome Bug Maniac!
